DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) PLAINTIFF MUST FILE A CERTIFICATE PER CC 1369.560. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR DAMAGES FOR DIMINUTION IN VALUE IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHAT REPAIRS ARE NOT COMPLETE. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT 1045 MASON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO OTTO KRAUSE'S STANDING AS A MINOR IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
